facebook.caption:
This place fixes a bad travel day.

Sunset Beach Bar & Restaurant on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Cold drink in hand, sky turning orange, 2,195 people gave it 4.3 stars and you'll see why in the first five minutes.

$15-30 a head. Worth every dong.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Sun dropping. Drink arriving. The sky at Sunset Beach Bar & Restaurant doing exactly what you came to Phu Quoc for. 4.3 stars, 2,195 reviews, and the vibe delivers. $15-30 a head.

instagram.caption:
Phu Quoc sunsets hit different with a cold drink in your hand.

Sunset Beach Bar & Restaurant. 4.3 stars. $15-30 a head. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Sky on fire. Drink in hand. Sunset Beach Bar & Restaurant doing its thing. 4.3 stars for a reason.
